**browser-use** is an open-source computer-use agent for browser automation. v0.x stable, Apache-2.0, actively maintained. Wraps Playwright and exposes a structured tool interface to any orchestrator.

What's distinct: it ships a planner that reasons about DOM state rather than pixel coordinates, which makes the tool more robust on dynamic sites than CUA-style screen agents.

- [official] https://github.com/browser-use/browser-use
- [benchmark] WebArena scores recorded in repo.
- [field report] integration into agent-framework workflows.
